metadata.subject: Arts Education
metadata.description: Students explore musical theatre as an integrated art form combining singing, acting, and dance to tell stories and express emotions. This course emphasizes vocal technique, character work, movement integration, and ensemble performance in musical theatre contexts. Students develop skills in audition preparation, repertoire selection, and collaborative musical theatre performance.
metadata.general_description: Integrate singing, acting, and dance to perform and create musical theatre works.
cross_curricular_connections: English Language Arts (script interpretation and lyrics)

big_ideas.statement: Musical theatre integrates singing, acting, and movement as unified means of storytelling and emotional expression.
big_ideas.elaboration: In musical theatre, each element—music, lyrics, character development, and choreography—works together to enhance narrative and deepen audience engagement and meaning.

big_ideas.statement: Vocal technique and musicality are essential foundations for musical theatre performance.
big_ideas.elaboration: Musical theatre performers develop vocal skills, understand harmonic and rhythmic accuracy, and use their voices expressively to embody characters and communicate through music.

big_ideas.statement: Character development in musical theatre requires understanding how music, lyrics, and performance create psychological complexity.
big_ideas.elaboration: Musical theatre performers use songs, dialogue, and physical expression to develop multifaceted characters whose motivations, relationships, and arcs are revealed through multiple artistic forms.

big_ideas.statement: Musical theatre performance demands technical preparation, ensemble collaboration, and authentic artistic commitment.
big_ideas.elaboration: Successful musical theatre requires dedicated practice, refined technique, coordinated ensemble work, and genuine emotional investment in storytelling.

competencies.raw: Develop vocal technique and musicality for musical theatre performance
i_can_statements: I can sing with proper breathing, support, and vocal quality in musical theatre styles
I can maintain pitch accuracy and harmonic awareness in ensemble singing
I can interpret song melodies and rhythms with musicality and expression
I can execute vocal techniques required across diverse musical theatre styles and genres

competencies.raw: Create characters that integrate singing, dialogue, and movement authentically
i_can_statements: I can analyze songs to understand character motivation and emotional arc
I can embody characters through a combination of vocal, physical, and emotional expression
I can develop character consistency across musical and dramatic moments
I can make intentional choices about how song lyrics and music reveal character

competencies.raw: Integrate movement and choreography with singing and acting
i_can_statements: I can perform choreography while maintaining vocal quality and character focus
I can move expressively and connect physical movement with emotional content
I can adapt to different choreographic styles and dance levels
I can coordinate movement with ensemble partners and maintain spatial awareness

competencies.raw: Explore diverse musical theatre styles and genres
i_can_statements: I can perform in classical musical theatre, contemporary musicals, and emerging styles
I can understand and adapt to different musical theatre conventions and aesthetic approaches
I can explore musical theatre from various cultural traditions and time periods
I can blend styles and influences to develop versatility as a musical theatre performer

competencies.raw: Analyze musical theatre scripts and understand how music, lyrics, and dialogue create meaning
i_can_statements: I can identify how songs advance plot and reveal character in musical theatre
I can understand the relationship between music, lyrics, and dramatic moments
I can analyze how composers use musical choices to express themes and emotions
I can recognize the historical and cultural contexts of musical theatre works

competencies.raw: Evaluate my own musical theatre performance and identify areas for continued development
i_can_statements: I can assess my vocal technique, acting choices, and movement coordination
I can recognize strengths and areas for improvement in my performance
I can evaluate how effectively I embody characters in musical theatre contexts
I can set meaningful goals for vocal, acting, and ensemble development

competencies.raw: Understand the role of individual performers in creating ensemble musical theatre experiences
i_can_statements: I can recognize how my vocal, physical, and emotional contributions affect ensemble
I can understand the interdependence of cast members in musical theatre productions
I can appreciate the challenges and rewards of ensemble musical theatre work
I can reflect on my role in creating cohesive and engaging musical theatre experiences

competencies.raw: Develop artistic judgment about musical theatre performance and production choices
i_can_statements: I can evaluate how well musical choices support characterization and storytelling
I can recognize effective use of music, movement, and design in productions
I can distinguish between technical execution and authentic artistic expression
I can understand innovation and reinterpretation in contemporary musical theatre

competencies.raw: Perform musical theatre with integrated vocal, physical, and emotional authenticity
i_can_statements: I can sing and act simultaneously, maintaining vocal quality while performing scenes
I can embody characters with focus, presence, and emotional authenticity
I can execute choreography with commitment while maintaining character and vocal performance
I can respond to live performance conditions and ensemble dynamics

competencies.raw: Prepare auditions and repertoire for musical theatre opportunities
i_can_statements: I can select and prepare audition songs appropriate to my voice and type
I can analyze audition material and make informed character and musical choices
I can develop multiple pieces of varied repertoire for audition readiness
I can present myself professionally in audition settings

competencies.raw: Share musical theatre work and articulate artistic vision and process
i_can_statements: I can present performances in classroom, showcase, or production contexts
I can write or speak about my musical theatre work and character development
I can discuss artistic choices, vocal interpretation, and collaborative process
I can engage audiences through authentic and committed musical theatre performance

competencies.raw: Document and reflect on musical theatre learning and artistic development
i_can_statements: I can record and analyze my vocal and performance work
I can maintain reflection notes about character development and learning
I can photograph or video record performances and rehearsals
I can write reflectively about musical theatre experiences and artistic growth

competencies.raw: Connect musical theatre to cultural traditions and contemporary artistic expression
i_can_statements: I can explore musical theatre traditions from diverse cultures and time periods
I can understand how musical theatre reflects and responds to social and cultural contexts
I can recognize musical theatre's role in contemporary popular culture
I can make connections between musical theatre and other art forms and disciplines

competencies.raw: Study diverse musical theatre artists and understand stylistic traditions
i_can_statements: I can analyze and learn from significant musical theatre performers and creators
I can explore distinctive styles of well-known musical theatre artists
I can identify innovations and influential works in musical theatre history
I can understand how musical theatre evolves in response to cultural changes

competencies.raw: Develop awareness of musical theatre careers and professional pathways
i_can_statements: I can research career opportunities in musical theatre performance and related fields
I can understand training and preparation required for professional musical theatre
I can develop a performance portfolio that demonstrates my capabilities
I can engage with mentorship and professional development in musical theatre

competencies.raw: Build community and contribute to musical theatre culture
i_can_statements: I can collaborate effectively with singers, actors, dancers, and production teams
I can mentor peers in vocal technique, character work, or movement
I can contribute to creating supportive environments for musical theatre artists
I can participate in building and strengthening musical theatre communities

areas.name: Vocal Technique and Musical Theatre Singing
areas.raw: Vocal Technique and Musical Theatre Singing
topics: Vocal anatomy, breathing, and support techniques for musical theatre
Vocal projection, resonance, and quality in musical theatre contexts
Maintaining vocal health and managing vocal demands
Interpreting melody and expressing lyrics through vocalization
Singing in ensemble and chorus contexts
Adapting vocal technique across musical theatre styles and genres

areas.name: Character Development and Acting in Musical Theatre
areas.raw: Character Development and Acting in Musical Theatre
topics: Script and song analysis for character understanding and motivation
Creating psychological depth in musical theatre characters
Emotional authenticity and vulnerability in performance
Relationship building and scene work with scene partners
Using music and lyrics to reveal and develop character
Stage presence and focus in musical theatre contexts

areas.name: Movement, Dance, and Physical Integration
topics: Executing choreography while maintaining vocal quality and character focus
Integration of movement with emotional and narrative content
Dance styles in musical theatre: tap, jazz, ballet, and contemporary
Spatial awareness and coordination with ensemble dancers
Physicality and gesture as expressive elements in performance
Movement vocabulary and technique across musical theatre styles

areas.name: Musical Theatre Repertoire, Auditions, and Professional Practice
areas.raw: Musical Theatre Repertoire, Auditions, and Professional Practice
topics: Classical musical theatre canon and iconic works
Contemporary and emerging musical theatre styles
Musical theatre traditions from diverse cultures
Audition preparation and repertoire selection strategies
Professional standards and expectations in musical theatre
Career pathways and opportunities in musical theatre performance
